title: This farm grows, processes and sells a local variety of pepper (peperone crusco)
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is ITALY UNIMOL and UNIPI. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 12 IT. The VC is not dependent on other SES for its production process. The relevant actor is the farmer who produces and processes peppers. The products are labelled 'Mountain product ('Prodotto di Montagna'), and the farmer is a partner of some agriculture associations. It was the best 2020 Guardian Farmer ('contadino custode') of the Basilicata region.

title: Interest on this VC
description: This farm closes the production chain of a typical traditional local product ('pepperoni cruschi') with the processing and sale to the final consumer. The dried fried sweet peppers are the flagship product, but the farm also produces and sells other products, such as aubergines in oil, and there is a cattle farm. The farmer Arleo was nominated the best 2020 Guardian Farmer ( Contadino custode ) because its activities are oriented to preserve the local agro-biodiversity. The Masseria Casa Arleo products are also certified by Prodotti di montagna label (Mountain products). Processing, packaging and direct sale of local products also via digital platforms.

title: Challenges
description: The VC is relatively tiny. Farmer is involved in regional farmer associationism, but its VC does not include other local farmers. The socio-environmental elements of the SES engaged in the VC are the farmer skills, traditional local vegetables and local culture. The farmer production seems not well market-oriented and not very connoted in term of both local culture and sustainable production. Overall the type of challenge faced by this VC is Current and Predicted. This VC is classified as Traditional.

title: Innovation
description: The type of innovation of this VC (Value Chain) is unspecified. In this case, the farmer closes the local product's production cycle, and he is personally involved in preserving the local food culture and biodiversity. The innovation is related to the whole VC. The land use systems involved are Cropland and Natural land. The local assets include Cultural.
